output.sparql:
PREFIX wikibase: <http://wikiba.se/ontology#>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX pq: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/>
PREFIX ps: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>
PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
SELECT DISTINCT ?awardingBodyLabel WHERE {
  wd:Q295235 p:P166 ?awardStatement .
  ?awardStatement ps:P166 ?award .
  ?award rdfs:label ?awardName .
  FILTER(LANGMATCHES(LANG(?awardName) , 'en') && REGEX(?awardName , 'Artist of the Year' , 'i'))
  .
  ?award wdt:P141 ?awardingBody .
  ?awardStatement pq:P585 ?date .
  ?date wikibase:timeValue ?time .
  BIND(YEAR(?time) AS ?year)
  .
  FILTER(?year >= 2010 && ?year <= 2019)
  .
  ?awardingBody rdfs:label ?awardingBodyLabel .
  FILTER(LANGMATCHES(LANG(?awardingBodyLabel) , 'en'))
}
